## Objective

Describe the setup or control outcome required.

## Scope

List the repository, ownership, access, branch-control, or template changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CoriTech ownership or control impact is clear.
- [ ] No secrets are included.
- [ ] Unknown account or platform details use placeholders.
- [ ] Evidence location is documented where required.

## Out of Scope

List anything that must not be implemented by this task.
